# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Namazue Console, please report it responsibly.

**Do NOT open a public issue.**

Instead, please email: **yunsu@namazue.dev**

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide a detailed response within 7 days.

## Scope

- `namazue.dev` (frontend application)
- `api.namazue.dev` (API endpoints)
- Source code in this repository

## Out of Scope

- Third-party services (USGS, JMA, AISstream, ODPT)
- Denial of service attacks
- Social engineering

## Disclosure

We follow coordinated disclosure. We will credit reporters in the fix commit unless they prefer to remain anonymous.
